description: BMAD Backup Configuration - Customize backup behavior here

mode.comment: streaming = zip→upload→delete per folder (saves disk space) | batch = zip all→upload all→delete all (faster but needs more space) | parallel = process multiple folders simultaneously (best speed with moderate disk usage)

spaceCheck.comment: failAction: skip (skip folder, continue) | stop (stop entire backup)

upload.comment: transfers = rclone internal transfers | parallelUploads = upload multiple zip files simultaneously | batchSize = number of folders to zip+upload in parallel (recommended: 2-4)

test.comment: Set enabled=true for testing with limited folders

download.comment: destinationDir = where to save downloaded files | batchSize = parallel download count | verifyAfterDownload = check zip integrity | extractAfterDownload = auto-extract zips
